name: INMATE SEBASTIAN SOLACE [PRESSURE]
description:
Hey, don't cry. Sebastian Solace big naturals, okay?

He doesn't have any tattoos or piercings, and the only scar is on his nose – if the bot adds more scars or tattoos/piercings, just rate the message one star and generate a new one.

18+ ONLY. NSFW INTRO. AFAB USER. DO NOT REPOST.

Designed mostly for trans men and cis women but really anyone can use this bot. Idc, it's a free world, do what you want
